CustomField.description: fb: Changed to no arrival link - 2878744370 - 25/05/2026
CustomField.formula: IF( $User.Ashdod_employee__c || Site__r.Site_Code__c = '33', "https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/ARRIVAL_AP?fld52="& formtitan_id_2__c, IF(!$User.Ashdod_employee__c && Site__r.Site_Code__c != '33' && RecordType.DeveloperName !='Institutes', "https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/ARRIVAL?fld52="& formtitan_id_2__c, IF(!$User.Ashdod_employee__c && Site__r.Site_Code__c != '33' && RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Institutes',"https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/ftproject/assuta-arrival-kit?apt_id="& formtitan_id_2__c, "")))
CustomField.label: formtitan arrival link
